# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Problem

What problem does this PR solve?

## Solution

How is the problem solved in this PR?

## Scope

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## Verification

Paste command outputs or screenshots.

```bash
flutter analyze
flutter test
flutter build apk --release
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I synced/rebased with the latest `main`.
- [ ] I added/updated relevant tests.
- [ ] I updated README and/or CHANGELOG when needed.
- [ ] I checked that CI passes.
- [ ] I confirmed there are no unrelated changes.

## Breaking Changes

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Contains breaking changes (describe below)

If there are breaking changes, explain migration steps.

## Notes

Any additional context for reviewers.
